Name: 24 AWG Flexible Silicone Wire - 3 Meters
Purpose: Multi-strand flexible wiring for internal connections between the ESP32-C3, TFT display, and mechanical switches.

Name: Outemu Mechanical Switches (10 PCS Pack)
Purpose: Mechanical tactile switches for music controls (Play/Pause, Next, Previous). Chosen for their durability and standard plate-mount compatibility.

Name: 1.8 inch TFT LCD Display Module ST7735 SPI
Purpose: To display the song title, artist name, and connection status in real-time.

Name: ESP32-C3 SuperMini Development Board
Purpose: Main microcontroller with built-in Wi-Fi used to fetch real-time music data from the Spotify API and control the TFT display.
